name: convert
description: Convert a numeric value from one unit to another within the same category. Use this when you need a specific conversion result (e.g., '100 cm to m'). Do not use this to list units or explore categories—use list_units, categories, or help instead. Returns the converted value in the target unit.

value.description: The numeric value to convert. Accepts integers or decimals (e.g., 100, 25.5, 98.6).

from_unit.description: The source unit abbreviation or alias (e.g., 'cm', 'kg', 'F', 'mi', 'GB'). For temperature, use case-sensitive 'C', 'F', or 'K'. Use list_units to see valid units for a category.

to_unit.description: The target unit abbreviation or alias (e.g., 'm', 'lb', 'C', 'km', 'MB'). Must be in the same category as from_unit. For temperature, use case-sensitive 'C', 'F', or 'K'.

name: list_units
description: List all units available in a specific category. Use this to discover valid units before converting, or to check if a specific unit is supported. For performing actual conversions, use convert instead.

name: categories
description: Show all available unit conversion categories. Use this to discover what types of conversions the skill supports. No parameters required.

name: help
description: Show detailed help for a specific unit category, including supported units and conversion formulas. Use this to learn about a category before converting. For listing all categories, use categories instead.

category.description: The category to show help for. Valid values: 'length', 'weight', 'temperature', 'area', 'volume', 'speed', 'time', 'data'.
